### Now

AI Transformation Architect leading enterprise AI tooling adoption across the software development lifecycle at Cisco Security. Background as a full-stack software engineer (Python, React) before moving into AI enablement, governance, and developer experience — building the frameworks, tooling, and cross-BU programs that help engineering orgs adopt AI-assisted development at scale.

**Focus:** AI enablement · developer experience · Python · homelab networking · internal tools
